scripts.postinstall: if [ "${VERCEL:-}" = "1" ]; then npm run build --workspace @earlycv/config; else npm run build:packages; fi
scripts.dev:api: if [ -f apps/api/package.json ]; then npm run dev --workspace @earlycv/api; else printf 'apps/api workspace not created yet; dev:web still runs the web workspace.\n'; fi
scripts.dev: if [ -f apps/api/package.json ]; then npm run dev:web & npm run dev:api & wait; else npm run dev:web; fi
scripts.build: if [ -f apps/api/package.json ]; then npm run build --workspace @earlycv/api; fi && if [ -f apps/web/package.json ]; then npm run build --workspace @earlycv/web; fi
scripts.lint: sh -c 'biome lint --config-path "$(pwd)/biome.json" apps packages specs docs AGENTS.md README.md package.json biome.json .env.example docker-compose.yml' && if [ -f apps/web/package.json ] || [ -f apps/api/package.json ] || ls packages/*/package.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run lint --workspaces --if-present; else printf 'No workspaces created yet; root Biome lint only.\n'; fi
scripts.check: sh -c 'biome check --config-path "$(pwd)/biome.json" apps packages specs docs AGENTS.md README.md package.json biome.json .env.example docker-compose.yml' && if [ -f apps/web/package.json ] || [ -f apps/api/package.json ] || ls packages/*/package.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run check --workspaces --if-present; else printf 'No workspaces created yet; root check only.\n'; fi
scripts.test: if [ -f apps/web/package.json ] || [ -f apps/api/package.json ] || ls packages/*/package.json >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm run test --workspaces --if-present; else printf 'No workspace tests are defined yet.\n'; fi
scripts.db:generate: if [ -f packages/database/package.json ]; then npm run generate --workspace packages/database; else printf 'packages/database workspace not created yet; skipping db:generate.\n'; fi
scripts.db:migrate: if [ -f packages/database/package.json ]; then npm run migrate --workspace packages/database; else printf 'packages/database workspace not created yet; skipping db:migrate.\n'; fi
scripts.compose:up: if [ -f docker-compose.yml ] || [ -f docker-compose.yaml ] || [ -f compose.yml ] || [ -f compose.yaml ]; then docker compose up -d; else printf 'Compose file not created yet; skipping compose:up.\n'; fi
scripts.compose:down: if [ -f docker-compose.yml ] || [ -f docker-compose.yaml ] || [ -f compose.yml ] || [ -f compose.yaml ]; then docker compose down; else printf 'Compose file not created yet; skipping compose:down.\n'; fi
